---
title: "`r params$title`"
params:
  rds_path: NULL
  session_info: NULL
  title: NULL
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    self-contained: false
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
session_info_available <- TRUE
# ---- Safety check ----
if (is.null(params$session_info) || !file.exists(params$session_info)) {
  session_info_available <- FALSE
}

session_to_html <- function(x) {
  htmltools::tags$div(
    style = "
      border: 1px solid #ddd;
      border-radius: 8px;
      padding: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
      font-family: monospace;
      background: #fafafa;
    ",
    htmltools::tags$div(htmltools::tags$b("R version:"), x$r_version),
    htmltools::tags$div(htmltools::tags$b("Platform:"), x$platform),
    htmltools::tags$div(htmltools::tags$b("Running under:"), x$running_under),
    htmltools::tags$div(htmltools::tags$b("Time zone:"), x$timezone),
    htmltools::tags$div(htmltools::tags$b("BLAS:"), x$blas),
    htmltools::tags$div(htmltools::tags$b("LAPACK:"), x$lapack),
    htmltools::tags$div(htmltools::tags$b("Base packages:"), x$base_packages),
    htmltools::tags$div(htmltools::tags$b("Namespace:"), x$namespace_packages)
    
  )
}

if (session_info_available) {
  session_info <- readr::read_csv(params$session_info) |>
    dplyr::select(-shard) |>
    dplyr::distinct()
  output <- htmltools::tagList(
    htmltools::tags$h3("Session Information"),
    seq_len(nrow(session_info)) |>
    purrr::imap(\(x, idx) session_to_html(session_info[idx, ]))
  )
  output
}
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# ---- Safety check ----
if (is.null(params$rds_path) || !file.exists(params$rds_path)) {
  # stop("Parameter rds_path is missing or invalid")
  return(0)
}

test_list <- readr::read_rds(params$rds_path)


# ---- Coverage colouring ----
coverage_colour <- function(x) {
  if (is.na(x)) return("#eeeeee")
  if (x < 60) return("#f8d7da")   # red-ish
  if (x < 80) return("#fff3cd")   # yellow-ish
  return("#d4edda")               # green-ish
}

# ---- Render all test classes ----
output <- htmltools::tagList(
  lapply(test_list, function(x) {

    test_class <- x$test_class[1]

    # ---- Overview row ----
    x_overview <- x |>
      dplyr::summarise(
        fn_name = "OVERVIEW",
        test_url = "",
        tests = sum(as.numeric(tests), na.rm = TRUE),
        skipped = sum(as.numeric(skipped), na.rm = TRUE),
        failures = sum(as.numeric(failures), na.rm = TRUE),
        errors = sum(as.numeric(errors), na.rm = TRUE),
        time = sum(as.numeric(time), na.rm = TRUE),
        # calculate passing-rate: [skipped + failures + errors] / total tests
        rate = round((1 - sum(skipped, failures, errors) / tests) * 100, digits = 2)
      )
    
    # ---- Main table ----
    x_tbl <- x |>
      dplyr::rename(coverage = file_coverage) |>
      dplyr::rowwise() |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        coverage = as.numeric(coverage),
        tests = as.numeric(tests),
        skipped = as.numeric(skipped),
        failures = as.numeric(failures),
        errors = as.numeric(errors),
        time = round(as.numeric(time), 4),
        # calculate passing-rate: [skipped + failures + errors] / total tests
        rate = round((1 - sum(skipped, failures, errors) / tests) * 100, digits = 2),
        fn_name_sub2 = ifelse(fn_name_sub == "", "", paste0("-", fn_name_sub)),
        fn_name = ifelse(
          is.na(script_url),
          fn_name,
          sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank">%s</a>%s', script_url, fn_name, fn_name_sub2)
        ),
        test_url = ifelse(
          is.na(test_url),
          "",
          sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank">View</a>', test_url)
        )
      ) |>
      dplyr::ungroup() |>
      dplyr::select(-script_url, -test_class, -fn_name_sub, -fn_name_sub2) |>
      dplyr::bind_rows(x_overview) |>
      dplyr::relocate(rate, .before = coverage) |>
      dplyr::rename(
        Function = fn_name,
        `Coverage [%]` = coverage,
        Tests = test_url,
        `Time [s]` = time,
        `Passing Rate [%]` = rate
      )

    htmltools::tagList(
      htmltools::tags$h3(sprintf("Test type: %s", test_class)),
      reactable::reactable(
        x_tbl,
        searchable = FALSE,
        sortable = TRUE,
        highlight = TRUE,
        compact = FALSE,
        bordered = TRUE,
        striped = TRUE,
        pagination = FALSE,
        defaultColDef = reactable::colDef(align = "center"),
        columns = list(
          Function = reactable::colDef(html = TRUE, align = "left"),
          Tests = reactable::colDef(html = TRUE),
          `Coverage [%]` = reactable::colDef(
            style = function(value) {
              list(
                background = coverage_colour(value),
                fontWeight = "bold"
              )
            }
          ),
          tests = reactable::colDef(show = FALSE),
          skipped = reactable::colDef(show = FALSE),
          failures = reactable::colDef(show = FALSE),
          errors = reactable::colDef(show = FALSE),
          `Passing Rate [%]` = reactable::colDef(
            html = TRUE,
            cell = function(value, index) {
              row <- x_tbl[index, ]
              sprintf(
                paste0(
                  '<div title="',
                  'Total: %s&#10;',
                  'Skipped: %s&#10;',
                  'Failures: %s&#10;',
                  'Errors: %s" ',
                  'style="width:100%%; height:100%%; display:block;">',
                  '%s',
                  '</div>'
                ),
                row$tests,
                row$skipped,
                row$failures,
                row$errors,
                value
              )
            },
            style = function(value) {
              list(
                background = coverage_colour(value),
                fontWeight = "bold"
              )
            })
        )
      ),
      htmltools::tags$br()
    )
  })
)

output
```
